pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 11 if the source/target version remains at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (0.7.x) do not support JDK 11 class files, causing runtime errors during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.inject is not part of JDK 11 and may be removed from classpath; Jakarta namespace is required for modern dependency injection standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation is not part of JDK 11 and may be removed from classpath; Jakarta namespace is required for modern annotation standards.
